narrative:
Norwood 2-B (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,242 registered voters, with 65.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.1 percentage points.
